'''Gorto Zaga''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]], and [[Chief/Legends|chief]] of the [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]] town of [[Deadend]], who could often be found in that settlement's [[Black Hole (Kiffex)|Black Hole]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]].

He was killed in [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]] by [[Vilmarh Grahrk]], who, along with [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]], [[Zao]], and [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]], was trying to escape from an army of [[Anzat (species)|Anzati]] led by [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]], who had attacked Black Hole.

==Behind the scenes==
At least once, the ''[[Star Wars: Darkness]]'' [[Star Wars: Darkness (trade paperback)|trade paperback]] misspells Zaga's name as ''Gorto Draga''.
